title: Inside backend-auth — components & how they call each other
subtitle: box = component [technology] · arrow = uses / calls · the JWT signing key lives in one component (crown jewel)

cards: +Thrift RPC Dispatcher|[go-common server]|authenticates caller · routes each RPC to a domain service
jewel:+JWT Key Manager|holds & uses signing key
jewel:+Field Encryption|[Category-A keys]|encrypts PII / secrets before persist

rels: Dispatcher → domain services → Repository/DAO → MongoDB (writes pass through Field Encryption)
JWT Key Manager → used by token-issuing flows in api-oauth2 — its key never leaves this container
refs: callers api-auth (L3) · api-oauth2 (L3) — appears in Dynamic: Login + MFA · OAuth2 token — zoom out: Container view Auth & Tokens (L2)
caption: Identity Platform · Component view · backend-auth (C4 L3) — components decomposed from client/* + internal/ + model/
